name: io.github.Usiiel/odoo-connector
description: Claude MCP connector for Odoo ERP. Manage CRM, sales, purchases, inventory, projects, employees, helpdesk, expenses, bank reconciliation, subscriptions, eCommerce, marketing, and more — in plain language. Works with Odoo Online and Community (v16-v19).

environment_variables.name: ODOO_URL
environment_variables.description: Your Odoo instance URL, e.g. https://yourcompany.odoo.com

environment_variables.name: ODOO_DB
environment_variables.description: Database name (the subdomain for SaaS, e.g. 'yourcompany')

environment_variables.name: ODOO_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key from Odoo Preferences > Security > API Keys

tools.name: odoo_setup
tools.description: Interactive wizard to connect Claude to your Odoo instance step by step

tools.name: odoo_ping
tools.description: Verify the Odoo connection and return server version and user ID

tools.name: odoo_buscar_cliente
tools.description: Search Odoo contacts / customers by name or email

tools.name: crm_resumen_pipeline
tools.description: Pipeline overview grouped by stage with total expected revenue

tools.name: crm_listar_oportunidades
tools.description: List CRM opportunities / leads with optional filters (status, search term)

tools.name: crm_crear_oportunidad
tools.description: Create a new CRM opportunity with customer, value, deadline and salesperson

tools.name: crm_actualizar_etapa
tools.description: Move a deal to a different pipeline stage

tools.name: ventas_listar_ordenes
tools.description: List sales orders filtered by status, date range or customer name

tools.name: ventas_detalle_orden
tools.description: Get full details of a specific sales order including product lines

tools.name: ventas_resumen_mes
tools.description: Monthly sales summary for confirmed orders, grouped by salesperson

tools.name: gastos_listar
tools.description: List employee expenses filtered by status (draft, reported, approved)

tools.name: gastos_crear
tools.description: Register a new employee expense

tools.name: gastos_resumen_empleado
tools.description: Expense summary grouped by employee

tools.name: banco_listar_cuentas
tools.description: List bank journals configured in Odoo

tools.name: banco_movimientos_sin_conciliar
tools.description: Find unreconciled bank statement lines

tools.name: banco_estado_extractos
tools.description: Bank statement status (open / closed)

tools.name: banco_pagos_recientes
tools.description: List payments registered in the last N days

tools.name: contabilidad_facturas_proveedor
tools.description: List vendor bills filtered by date range and status

tools.name: contabilidad_cruzar_banco_facturas
tools.description: Auto-match unreconciled bank movements with unpaid vendor bills by amount

tools.name: actividades_pendientes
tools.description: List pending activities scheduled in Odoo, with optional overdue filter

tools.name: helpdesk_tickets
tools.description: List helpdesk tickets filtered by status, team, assignee or priority

tools.name: helpdesk_detalle_ticket
tools.description: Get full details of a specific helpdesk ticket

tools.name: website_paginas
tools.description: List published pages on the Odoo website

tools.name: ecommerce_productos
tools.description: List eCommerce products on the Odoo website with optional category and search filters

tools.name: compras_listar_ordenes
tools.description: List purchase orders filtered by status, date range or vendor name

tools.name: compras_detalle_orden
tools.description: Get full details of a specific purchase order including product lines

tools.name: compras_resumen_mes
tools.description: Monthly purchase summary grouped by vendor

tools.name: inventario_stock
tools.description: Query current stock levels by product or location

tools.name: inventario_movimientos
tools.description: List stock transfers / movements filtered by status, direction or date

tools.name: proyecto_listar
tools.description: List projects (active or all)

tools.name: proyecto_tareas
tools.description: List project tasks filtered by project, status, assignee or title

tools.name: empleados_listar
tools.description: List employees filtered by department or name

tools.name: calendario_eventos
tools.description: List upcoming calendar events for the next N days

tools.name: suscripciones_listar
tools.description: List recurring subscriptions filtered by status or customer name

tools.name: asistencias_reporte
tools.description: Report employee check-in / check-out attendance records

tools.name: marketing_campanas
tools.description: List email marketing campaigns filtered by status

tools.name: whatsapp_mensajes
tools.description: List recent WhatsApp messages sent from Odoo

tools.name: whatsapp_plantillas
tools.description: List available WhatsApp message templates

tools.name: conversaciones_canales
tools.description: List Discuss channels and group conversations

tools.name: documentos_listar
tools.description: List documents stored in the Odoo Documents module

tools.name: citas_listar
tools.description: List scheduled appointments within a date range

tools.name: citas_tipos
tools.description: List available appointment types configured in Odoo
